control_awareness: Amount-based approval control P2P-C-001 requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Pre-PO approval control P2P-C-003 requires approval before purchase order issuance. Segregation of duties control P2P-C-002 prevents requester self-approval but does not affect this action.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department_head approval before PO issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the purchase need amount is 1,750,000 which triggers department_head approval, and there is no quarter-end pressure, creating one consolidated purchase request for the full amount minimizes approval lead time and administrative overhead while complying with all controls.
reason: The total amount exceeds 1,000,000 so department_head approval is required. Creating a single purchase request for the full amount is operationally simpler and preferred since no quarter-end pressure exists and approval lead time of 1.5 days is acceptable.
